source_meaning: to make matters worse, to add insult to injury
target_meaning: to make a bad situation worse; to add insult to injury; to rub salt in the wound

source_idiom: ما هكذا يا سعد تورد الإبل
source_meaning: This is not the right way to do it; this is not how things should be done.
target_meaning: to not follow norms; putting the cart before the horse
